reviews.review_description: This is an amazing game but the only problem is lack of players I think it would be greatly beneficial to the game if it were to have a story mode/ campaign or even a bot lobby. But other than that this is a great game amazing gun physics and amazing outfits

reviews.review_title: Great game but I have a suggestion
reviews.review_description: So i’m a big fan of western games an this is exactly what I’m looking for. I love the gun mechanic’s and the repeater is great but I have nobody to enjoy this with. So I think you should make a bot mode so you can play by yourself or with others. But other than that it is a great game that is full of potential.

reviews.review_title: This could be a really fun game but…
reviews.review_description: The biggest and most prevalent issue is that this game is COMPLETELY DEAD sure it’s brand new but I can’t even get into a game! There are a couple glitches with the menus not closing, the rifle is SUPER hard to use, there isn’t really any clear directions on how to pick up the gold pans (I still can’t figure it out), and when I did finally end up getting into a game, my opponent quit and I wasn’t able to exit the match. Overall full of potential, but needs work. I’m really excited to play this in the future!

I realize the game just came out 2 days ago, but here are my suggestions as a kid with irl experience with western shootouts and vr, 1. Make more guns, there could be a variety of guns instead of a model 1873 repeater and a lemat revolver, there could be like a colt ssa or a bolt action rifle of even some shotguns, 2. Make gun customization, as in like engravings or changing grips or barrels or even frames, 3. Fix the repeater, it’s like weird on the iron sights so maybe fix that, 4. Fix the joining and make it where you can challenge people to fights or duels, 5 . Make an open world mode where people can chose the fate, either be a gunslinging outlaw or a lawman or civilian and ride horses, 6 . Add teams to the fighting, 7 fix the joining I haven’t played a single match yet maybe cause it’s a new game and not popular or something is wrong idk, but those are just suggestions so people will be more engaged in your game “I tried, in the end I did.”- Arthur Morgan🤠🤠
One thing I must say there is not one person playing but I love but I say more guns
Game is fantastic from what I have seen, aside from the occasional bugs but they're just minor things. I just wish more people liked and played things like this, it has such good potential.
